rationale: Educ. Code §12.1054 governs conflict-of-interest rules for open-enrollment charter school officials. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 12.1054. APPLICABILITY OF LAWS RELATING TO CONFLICT OF INTEREST.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and this conflict-of-interest statute.
